rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS et al VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Cahill Contractors, Inc. To Produce Its Person(S) Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records For Deposition And Documents
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, APRIL 30, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Cahill Contractors, Inc. to produce its person(s) most qualified and custodian of records for deposition and documents: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: SARGENT, CATHERINE, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. EATON CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Further Responses To Discovery And Verifications
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, APRIL 30, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 2, Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc.¿s motion to compel further responses to defendant¿s requests for admissions Nos. 10-11, 14-15 and 33-62 and to compel verifications is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiffs have 15 days to serve further responses. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ELROY PORCHIA et al VS. 3M COMPANY, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN INTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Duro Dyne West Corporations Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Sebastian Porchia, Elroy Porchia And Xavier Porchia To Provide Further Verified Amended Responses To Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Sets 1 And 2; And Compelling Agreed Production Of Responsive Documents And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, APRIL 30, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 3, Defendant Duro Dyne West Corp.¿s amended motion to compel plaintiffs to provide further verified amended responses to special interrogatories, request for production of documents, sets 1 and 2, to compel agreed production of responsive documents and request for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)
